name: PT Mitra Energi Persada Tbk
summary: PT Mitra Energi Persada Tbk engages in the gas trading and distribution business in Indonesia. The company trades in and distributes gas through a network of downstream pipelines in South Sumatra region. It is also involved in the power plant, coal mining, and other related businesses. The company was formerly known as PT Korpora Persada Investama, Tbk and changed its name to PT Mitra Energi Persada Tbk in January 2008. The company was founded in 1981 and is based in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Mitra Energi Persada Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Mulya Tara Mandiri.
